definition.name: def-order-unit-space
definition.definition: A real vector space A with a proper convex cone A^+ (a>=b iff a-b in A^+) and a distinguished e in A^+ is an order-unit space if (i) e is an order unit: for each a there is lambda>0 with -lambda e <= a <= lambda e, and (ii) A is Archimedean: na<=e for all n in N implies a<=0. The order-unit norm is ||a||=inf{t>0: -t e <= a <= t e}. With e=1 and cone A^+={a in B(H)_sa: a>=0}, B(H)_sa is an order-unit space whose order-unit norm equals the operator norm.
